articles.title: Trump Shares AI-Generated Image of Himself on Mount Rushmore, Reviving 'Dream' to Join Iconic US Presidents
articles.description: The Mount Rushmore National Memorial stands as a monumental effigy chiselled directly into the granite topography of the Black Hills in Keystone, South Dakota.
articles.content:
Washington: In a striking digital assertion of his legacy, US President Donald Trump has circulated a digitally fabricated rendering portraying his own likeness alongside the historic American leaders immortalised on Mount Rushmore.

articles.title: Trump revives his long-held 'dream' to become Mount Rushmore’s fifth face
articles.description: The US President shared an AI-generated image placing himself among America’s most celebrated leaders as supporters continue lobbying for his addition to the iconic monument
articles.content:
US President Donald Trump has rekindled a long-standing debate by sharing an AI-generated image portraying his own likeness alongside the historic American leaders immortalised on Mount Rushmore.

articles.title: Fishing out fake news using a deep-learning neural network
articles.description: Researchers developed F2IND-IT!, an AI system combining text and image analysis to accurately detect fake news in India.
articles.content: Researchers at the ABV-Indian Institute of Information Technology (IIIT), Gwalior, have developed a new artificial intelligence system that combines text analysis, image recognition and fuzzy logic to detect fake news in Indian media with high accura... [2162 chars]

articles.title: Asia stocks count on AI boom to offset Gulf risks
articles.description: Asian share markets remain underpinned by demand for semiconductors and AI-related gear, with Japan's Nikkei up a further 0.5%, having risen almost 5% last week to all-time highs.
articles.content:
Asian share markets firmed on Monday as the boom in all things AI continued to drive demand, offsetting a lack of progress in Gulf peace talks that challenged optimism on a re-opening of the Strait of Hormuz and lifted oil prices.

articles.title: The hedge fund veteran trying to make his past self obsolete with AI
articles.description: Former short seller Joe O’Donnell makes software for analysts that can perform tasks in hours that used to take him weeks.
articles.content:
Now, he is trying to make much of what he did in his past job obsolete.
O’Donnell’s startup, Canary Data, makes artificial-intelligence software for professional analysts and investors that can perform tasks in hours that used to take him days or wee... [2995 chars]

articles.title: US takes step to halt Nvidia AI chip shipments to Chinese firms outside China
articles.description: The U.S. Department of Commerce on Sunday moved to close a potential loophole that may have led companies to export the world's most advanced chips - like Nvidia's most sophisticated Blackwell processors - to subsidiaries of Chinese companies located outside China.
